Use only devices from the provided allow-list.

task relay1_on_wait_read_water {
  require cap(relay1)
  require cap(water_sensor)
  set relay1 = 1
  readback relay1 expect 1
  halt
}

task relay1_pulse {
  require cap(relay1)
  set relay1 = 1
  wait 50ms
  set relay1 = 0
  halt
}
